spell.name: Blood Bandit
spell.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 10s.
1st Blood Draw
Throw an axe in the targeted direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit, based on the number of Rending Bleed Charges on them.
2nd Blood Bandit:
Throw an axe infused with blood magic in the targeted direction, dealing 363 physical damage
Heals you based on the number of Rending Bleed Charges on the first enemy hit.

Rending Bleed Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 578 | 660 | 743 | 825
Lifesteal: 743 | 743 | 743 | 743

spell.name: Whirlwind
spell.description:
Spin around like a whirlwind, swinging your axe and dealing 203 physical damage every 0.5s in a 5m radius while channeling for 2.5s(can't be interrupted and can move while channeling).
Each consecutive hit on the same enemy increases the damage by 15
Each 0.5s spent channeling cost 10 Energy.

spell.name: Tear Apart
spell.description:
Cleave through all enemies in a 7m radius around you, dealing 453 physical damage. If any enemy hit has Rending Bleed Charges, all enemies hit receive the same number of charges as the enemy with the most charges.
Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 91 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times). 
If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.

spell.name: Bloody Reap
spell.description:
Reap all enemies in a 5m around you after 1s, dealing 392 physical damage. Follow up with a second swing after 0.5s, dealing physical damage based on their current Health.
Target Health: Above 40%|Below 40%
Damage: 457|870

spell.name: Razor Cut
spell.description:
Leap in the targeted direction, dealing 508 physical damage in a cone in front of you on impact. Causes all enemies hit to bleed, dealing 180 true damage over 6s.
Hitting at least one enemy player will reduce the cooldown of this ability by 40%.

spell.name: Aftershock
spell.description:
Leap towards the targeted position and slam your axe into the ground dealing 769 physical damage to all enemies in a 4m radius.
Splits the earth in a cone in front of the impact area, throwing all enemies hit in the air for 0.6s. Decreases Max and current Health by 20% for 5s.

spell.name: Mighty Blow
spell.description:
Leap towards the targeted enemy,
interrupting their spell casting. 
Deals physical damage based on the amount of Heroic Charges on you.

Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 264 | 422 | 634 | 894
Consumes all your Heroic Charges.

spell.name: Charge
spell.description:
Charge towards the targeted enemy, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects, Debuffs, and damage for 1s.
Enemies who are not mounted will be stunned for 0.8s on impact (ignoring crowd control resistance). 
Deals physical damage to the targeted enemy based on the amount of Heroic Charges on you.

Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 294 | 471 | 707 | 1001
Consumes all your Heroic Charges.

spell.name: Spinning Blades
spell.description:
Leap Towards the targeted position, becoming Immune to all Crowd Control effects until impact.
Throws enemies into the air for 0.6s
Deals 232 physical damage in a 5m radius on impact
Hitting at least one enemy will increase your Attack Speed and physical normal attack damage by 50% for 3s

spell.name: Crescent Slash
spell.description:
Slice the air to shoot a demonic wave in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing 660 magical damage.
Consumes Heroic Charges for one of the following secondary effects.

1 Heroic Charge: Slows by 30% for 3.53s
2 Heroic Charges: Silences for 3.53s
3 Heroic Charges: Deals additional 471 magical damage

spell.name: Fearless Strike
spell.description:
Dash towards the targeted position, dealing 544 physical damage to all enemies you pass through.
Decreases their damage resistances for 6s based on the amount of Heroic Charges on you.

Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Resistance Reduction: 21 | 34 | 52 | 73
Consumes all your Heroic Charges.

spell.name: Soulless Stream
spell.description:
Slam your blades into the ground, unleashing magic waves in a 8.5m radius.
Decreases max and current Health of all enemies hit by 6% for 7s. 
Deals magical damage based on the amount of Heroic Charges on you.

Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 305 | 486 | 729 | 1033
Consumes all your Heroic Charges.

spell.name: Majestic Smash
spell.description:
Swing your sword in a 6m radius around you, throwing all enemies hit in the air for 0.83s.
Deals 160 physical damage.
While the enemies are in the air you follow up with a vertical smash, dealing physical damage in a line in front of and behind you based on the amount of Heroic Charges on you.

Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 315 | 508 | 762 | 1077
Consumes all your Heroic Charges.

spell.name: Deep Leap
spell.description:
Leap towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects, Debuffs, and damage until impact.
Deals 448 physical damage in a 5m radius on impact. 
Slows all enemies hit by 30% for 4.19s. Enemies within a 3m radius will be stunned for 2.52s.

spell.name: Battle Howl
spell.description:
Summon a magic circle with a 6m radius, silencing all enemies hit for 3.58s and Purging all buffs from them.
Increases your threat towards all mobs hit by 156.

spell.name: Gravitas
spell.description: Create a magical field with a 5m radius around you, rooting all enemies (ignoring crowd control resistance), while channeling for 2.5s (can't be interrupted). Increases your threat towards any rooted mob by 80 every 0.5s. At the end of the channel, enemies will remain rooted for 2s.

spell.name: Force of Nature
spell.description:
Split the earth in a 18m long line in front of you, releasing air jets that last for 4s.
Knocks back any enemy touching the air jets by 18m. 
Makes you the highest priority target to any mob hit.
Increases your Threat by 200 towards any mob within a 5m radius around you.

spell.name: Shrinking Curse
spell.description: Shrink all enemies in a cone in front of you, decreasing their max and current Health by 25% of their damage dealt and Healing Cast by 40% for 8s.

spell.name: Vendetta
spell.description:
Shoot a shockwave in the targeted direction, cursing the first enemy hit.
Pulls all enemies in a 8m radius toward the cursed enemy after 1.5s. 
Stuns for 1.23s. 
Deals 196 magical damage.

spell.name: Blessed Aurora
spell.description:
Conjure a 18m wide blessed aurora lasting 3s. I
ncreases Move Speed for up to 20 allies passing through the aurora by 30% for 5s. 
Applies a shield that absorbs up to 1324 damage (before resistances) while Move Speed is increased.
Bless your maces, restoring 64 Health for you and up to 5 allies in a 6m radius around you with every normal attack within the next 5s.

spell.name: Tackle
spell.description:
Dash toward the targeted position, knocking back all enemies you pass through by 3.07 and stunning them for 3.61s.
Deals 230 physical damage.

spell.name: Groundbreaker
spell.description:
Split the earth in a 15m long line in front of you, dealing 245 physical damage to all enemies hit.
Enemies at the center of the split earth will be stunned for 3.84s.

spell.name: Grasp of the Undead
spell.description:
Summon a giant undead hand at the targeted position, stunning all enemies within a 2.5m radius for 3.81s after 0.35s.
Deals 315 physical damage.

spell.name: Giant Steps
spell.description:
Grow to giant size, increasing your Armor by 59, your Magic Resistance by 103 and your Attack Range by 50% for 10s.
Create an aura with a 7m radius around you, Slowing all enemies in it by 20%
While the ability is active, you can cast Giant Smash multiple times by recasting the ability.
Giant Smash:Slam your hammers on the ground, dealing 347 physical damage to all enemies in a 4m radius around the targeted position.
Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.6s.

spell.name: Ground Pound
spell.description:
Leap towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects and damage until impact. Stuns all enemies in a 5.5m radius for 3.84s.
Deals 310 physical damage. 
Increases your damage resistances by 74 for each enemy hit (stacks up to 3 times) for 6s.

spell.name: Snipe Shot
spell.description: Deals 1273 Physical Damage to a single target.

spell.name: Exploding Shot
spell.description: Fires an exploding shot that deals 146 Physical Damage and places a bomb on the target. After a few seconds, the bomb will explode dealing 517 damage to any enemy in a 5m radius around the detonation. This damage cannot be reflected.

spell.name: Sweeping Bolt
spell.description: A strong bolt that sweeps through the enemy dealing 585 damage to every enemy it hits. It also interrupts enemy spell casting and channeling.

spell.name: Explosive Mine
spell.description: Shoot a mine into the ground, which becomes active after 2s. Once someone (ally or enemy) steps onto it, it detonates and deals 822 Magical Damage to all enemies within a 7m radius. This damage cannot be reflected.

spell.name: Deathward Climax
spell.description: A channeled spell dealing 27 Physical Damage for up to 12 hits. The damage is multiplied each hit and stacks up to 12 times. The last shot always hits twice.

spell.name: Vicious Barrage
spell.description: Fires a sustained barrage of bolts in a large cone in front of the caster dealing 296 Magical Damage per second. Against players, an additional 2% of the enemy's max health will be dealt as true damage each second. The channel lasts up to 5 seconds.

spell.name: Divine Engine
spell.description:
Unleash a 26m long beam of Avalonian energy in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies while channeling for 4s (cant be interrupted).
Deals 244 magical damage (vs players) / 79 magical damage (vs mobs) every 0.3s.
The beam slowly follows the cursor position.

spell.name: Falcon Smash
spell.description:
Float into the air and become immune to all Crowd Control effects for up to 2 seconds.
Recast the ability to dive towards the targeted position.
Deals physical damage within a 6 radius upon impact based on the distance of the enemy from the targeted position.

Distance: 4m - 6m
Damage: 957 - 602

spell.name: Gravitational Collapse
spell.description:
Unleash a powerful punch in a cone in front of you, dealing magical damage and slowing all enemies hit for 7.07 seconds based on the type of armor the enemy wears.
Armor: Plate or Mobs | Leather | other
Damage: 1378 | 870 | 508
Slow: 75% | 50% | 25%

spell.name: Blazing Geyser
spell.description:
Hit the ground, releasing a Blazing Geyser with a 3m radius in front of you.
Deals  682 magical damage.
Throws all enemies hit in the air for 0.5.
Hitting at least one enemy will reset the cooldown of your first-slot ability.

spell.name: Hundred Striking Fists
spell.description:
Release a flurry of fists in a cone in front of you while channeling for up to 2.5s (can't be interrupted).
Deals 131 physical damage (vs players) / 87 physical damage (vs mobs) every 0.5 seconds. 
The cone slowly follows the cursor position. 
2s after the last Striking Fist' hits, the enemy will take and additional 109 magical damage for each hit they have received. (Stacks up to 10 times).

spell.name: Infernal Boulder
spell.description:
Throw a boulder towards the targeted area, which bounces three times as it rolls.
Each impact deals 508 magical damage to all enemies within a 4m radius.
Also sets them on fire, dealing 152 magical damage over 3s and
reducing Healing Received by -20%. (Stacks up to 3 times.)

spell.name: Earth Crusher
spell.description:
Charge up the Earth Crusher, slowing yourself by 50% while channeling for up to 2s (can't be interrupted).
Deals magical damage to all enemies in an area around you.
The damage and radius is based on how long you have channeled (you may end the channel early).

Charge Up Time: 0.5s | 1s | 1.5s | 2s
Damage: 580 | 616 | 653 | 689
Radius: 5m | 7m | 8m | 9m
Channeling for the full duration will throw all enemies hit in the air for 1s.

spell.name: Purifying Combination
spell.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5.
1st Dive Kick: 
Leap towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects until impact. 
Throws enemies in the air for 1s.
Deals 156 physical damage.
2nd Purifying Fist: 
Punch the area in front of you, dealing 852 physical damage.
Purges all buffs from all enemies hit (except for healing over time effects).

spell.name: Enchanted Quiver
spell.description:
Enchant up to 6 of your arrows for the next 8s.
While you hold enchanted arrows, your attack speed is increased by 50% and your physical attack damage by 240%.
Each normal attack consumes 1 enchanted arrow.
Recast the ability within 8s to dash to targeted position and enchant 4 more arrows (cannot exceed 6 arrows).

spell.name: Magic Arrow
spell.description:
Shoot an arrow in the targeted direction, dealing magical damage upon impact with an enemy based on the time the arrow has been flying.
Time passed: 0s | 1.5s
Damage (vs. players): 492 | 666
Damage (vs. mobs): 580 | 810

spell.name: Rain of Arrows
spell.description: Fire volleys of arrows in the air every 0.5s, each landing at the targeted position after 0.5s, while channeling for 1.5s. Each volley deals 284 physical damage to all enemies within a 5m radius. Slows by 20% for 3.07s.

spell.name: Undead Arrows
spell.description:
Call upon the lost souls around you, increasing your Attack Range by 35% and Attack Speed by 20%. Deals an extra 158 magical damage on every normal attack.
Decreases your Defense by 20%.
The ability can last for up to 8s but can be deactivated earlier.

spell.name: Demon Arrow
spell.description:
Shoot an arrow infused with demonic power in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies. Deals physical damage to all enemies hit based on the amount of enemies the arrow has already hit(the damage can't be reflected).
Enemies hit: 1st | 2nd | 3rd | 4th or more
Damage: 597 | 724 | 852 | 980

spell.name: Raging Storm
spell.description:
Shoot a storm-infused arrow in the targeted diercton, which explodes into a 5m radius stormcloud lasting 4.8s upon impact with an enemy. Deals 76 magical damage every 0.3s.
Enemies leaving the area will continue to take 534 magical damage over 1.8s(this also happens after the cloud disappears). 
Whenever the ability deals damage, it will interrupt the hit enemy's spell casting.

spell.name: Lucent Hawk
spell.description:
Release a Lucent Hawk in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing 505 magical damage to each enemy hit.
The ability can be recast again within 3s up to 4 times.

spell.name: Reckless Charge
spell.description:
Dash towards the targeted position, throwing all enemies you pass through into the air for 0.6s.
Deals physical damage based on the amount of Spirit Spear Charges on you

Spirit Spear Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 201 | 323 | 485 | 687

spell.name: Fling
spell.description:
Fling the targeted enemy, pulling them 7m behind you.
Deals physical damage based on the amount of Spirit Spear Charges on you

Spirit Spear Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 185 | 295 | 443 | 627

spell.name: Rooting Smash
spell.description:
Swing your pike at the targeted enemy, rooting them for
4.93s.
Deals physical damage based on the amount of Spirit Spear Charges on you

Spirit Spear Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 252 | 402 | 604 | 855

spell.name: Spear Throw
spell.description:
Throw your spear in the targeted direction, releasing an electric shock in a 4m radius on impact with an enemy.
Deals 614 magical damage to all enemies shocked
Stuns for 2.81s.

spell.name: Corrupting Steel
spell.description:
Hurl your spear in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies. Deals 290 physical damage. Decreases damage resistances of all enemies hit by 37 for 4s.
The spear leaves behind a trail of corruption that lasts 4.2s. Deals 116 magical damage every 0.5s to all enemies standing on the path.

spell.name: Spectral Trident
spell.description:
Leap towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects, debuffs(except damage over time effects), and damage until impact. Roots all enemies in a 3m radius on impact for 4.68s. Deals 695 physical damage.
Conjures a mist of souls in a 8m radius around the impact location, lasting 6s. Increases Move Speed by 50% and Attack Speed by 100%, and reduces Cast Times by 30% for up to 10 allies within in.

spell.name: Breakthrough
spell.description: Dash towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects until you reach the targeted position. Purges all buffs from all the enemies you pass through. Deals 700 physical damage.

spell.name: Circle of Life
spell.description:
Mend the wounds of up to  5  allies within a  11m radius , healing them  based  on the  amount  of  Rejuvenation Charges  on the  ally .
Rejuvenation Charges:  0  |  1  |  2  |  3 
Healing:  175  |  217  |  282  |  370 
If you have  3  or more  Thorn Charges  active on you, you will root all enemies within the  heal radius  for 2.32s.
Deals  234 magical damage .

spell.name: Well of Life
spell.description:
Create a Well of Life with  7m radius  at the targeted position, lasting  6s .
Heals up to  10  allies within the Well for  78 Health  every  1s .

spell.name: Living Armor
spell.description: Protect the targeted ally with Living Armor, increasing their  damage resistances  by  37   for  4s . Whenever the  target receives damage  , they will restore  ? Health .

spell.name: Spiritual Seed
spell.description:
Plant a Spiritual Seed in the targeted ally, healing the target for  411 Health  after  3s .
The spell can be  recast  again within  2.5s , but stacking it twice on the same target will override the first cast.

spell.name: Elevated Nature
spell.description:
Conjure an aura with  9m radius , increasing your  Move Speed  by  15%  while  channeling  for up to  5.6s  (can't be interrupted).
Restores  63 Health  (when used alone) /  73 Health  (when healing at least one ally) every  0.8s for up to  10  allies.

spell.name: Spirit Animal
spell.description:
Release a Spirit Animal from the targeted position in the targeted direction that heals any ally touching it by  195 , creating a  25m long  trail that lasts for  9m .
Heals up to  15  allies standing on the trail every  1s  for  24 Health .
For  each ally  standing on the trail, the healing is increased by  30% .

spell.name: Soul Link
spell.description:
Bind the souls of  two targets  together, linking them for  7s .
If  2 allies  are linked:  Transfers  50%  of the  damage taken  by one target to the other target. Transfers  100%  of the  Healing Received  by one target to the other target.
If an  ally  and an  enemy  are linked:  Transfers  30%  of the  Healing Received  by the enemy to the ally. Transfers  10%  of the  damage the ally takes  to the enemy. 
If  2 enemies  are linked:  Deals  50%  of the  damage one target takes  (after damage resistances) to the other enemy as  true damage .

spell.name: Bloodthirsty Blade
spell.description:
Give in to your Bloodthirsty Blade, dealing an additional 167 magical damage  (vs. players) / 100 magical damage  (vs. mobs) with each normal attack. Steals 100% of the Health the enemy has  lost  through the  bonus damage . Increases your Move Speed by 30%.
Deals 4% of your Max Health as true damage to yourself every 1s. The ability lasts up to  6s  but can be deactivated earlier.

spell.name: Slit Throat
spell.description:
Land a devastating blow on the targeted enemy, dealing  physical damage   based  on the  amount  of  Assassin Spirit Charges  on you or  Sunder Armor Charges  on the enemy. Inflicts a bleed dealing  physical damage   based  on the  amount  of  Assassin Spirit Charges  on you or  Sunder Armor Charges  on the enemy over  4s . Reduces  Healing Received  by  20%  for  4s .
Charges:  0  |  1  |  2  |  3 
Direct Damage:  336  |  530  |  797  |  1130 
Bleed Damage:  111  |  177  |  266  |  377 

Consumes all Assassin Spirit and Sunder Armor Charges on you and the target.

spell.name: Lunging Stabs
spell.description:
Dash  towards the targeted position, dealing  physical damage  to all enemies you pass through  based  on their  current Health .

Target Health:  Above 40%  |  Below 40% 
Damage:  490  |  1056 

Hitting at least one enemy  player  below  40% Health  increases your  Cooldown Rate  by  90%  for  1s  .

spell.name: Blood Ritual
spell.description:
Infuse your blade with blood magic and swing it in a  cone in front  of you, dealing 354 magical damage immediately and another  153 magical damage over  1.4s  to all enemies hit. (Does not stack).
Deals  110 physical damage  over  3.5s  to yourself (  stacks  up to  3  times).
The ability can be  cast  again within  3s  for up to  3  times, increasing its  cooldown  by  5s  per cast.

spell.name: Ghost Strike
spell.description: Charge  through the targeted enemy, dealing  635 magical damage . Turns you  invisible  for  1s . Reduces  Energy Costs  by  50%  for  3s . If the target has  3 Sunder Armor Charges  or you have  3 Assassin Spirit Charges , the ability doesn't go on cooldown. Consumes all Assassin Spirit Charges or Sunder Armor Charges you have applied.

spell.name: Merciless Finish
spell.description:
Swing your daggers in a cone in front of you while  leaping backwards 8m . Deals  physical damage   based  on the  number  of  Assassin Spirit Charges  on you or  Sunder Armor Charges  on the target.
Charges:  0  |  1  |  2  |  3 
Damage:  289  |  461  |  691  |  976 
Consumes all applied Assassin Spirit Charges or Sunder Armor Charges

spell.name: Soaring Swipe
spell.description:
Leap towards the targeted position, dealing 265 physical damage in a 6m radius .
Slows all enemies hit by 50% for 4.84s.

spell.name: Vault Leap
spell.description: Vault Leap to the targeted position, dealing 629 physical damage in a 5m radius(can't be interrupted). Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.7s.

spell.name: Hurricane
spell.description:
Whirl your staff in a 5m radius around you, dealing 106 physical damage every 0.5s, while channeling for 2s(can move while channeling).
Enemy players will be knocked back by 12m(ignoring crowd control resistance). Mobs will have their spell casting interrupted.

spell.name: Fatal Blade
spell.description: Throw a demonic version of your weapon at the targeted position, which lands and spins in a 5m radius for 5s. Deals 83 physical damage every 0.75s. Slows all enemies within its radius by 8% and reduces all damage they deal by 22%(vs players)/ 10%(vs mobs) every 0.75s(stacks up to 4 times). The debuff lasts for 6s after leaving the radius.

spell.name: Tornado
spell.description: Send a tornado in the targeted direction, passing through all enemies and dealing 505 magical damage. Throws them in the air for 1.4s(ignoring Crowd Control Resistance and duration modifier). Slows all enemies within a 3m radius of the tornado by 80%

spell.name: Mystic Rocks
spell.description:
Conjure a cloud of Mystic Rocks in a 6m radius around you, slowing all enemies within it by 50%. Reduces their Healing Received by 35%. Increases your damage resistances by 60.
Negates all your Healing Received. Purges all healing over time effects on you.
The ability lasts up to 15s but can be deactivated sooner.

spell.name: Soul Shaker
spell.description:
Shake the ground along a 20m long line in the targeted direction, dealing 414 physical damage.
Leaves behind a wall of energy that lasts 3.5s, rooting all enemies who touch it for its duration.
The spell can be recast again within 3s, increasing its cooldown by 20s.

spell.name: Pyroblast
spell.description:
Charge up a Pyroblast, while channeling for up to 1.2s ( You can aim while channeling).
Deals magical damage upon impact with an enemy within a 4m radius based on how long you have channeled.

Time: 0s / 0.6s / 1.2s
Damage: 574 / 804 / 1033
If you channel for 1.2s the Pyroblast will also knock back all enemies hit by 3.5m.

spell.name: Flame Pillar
spell.description:
Conjure a flaming pillar with a 4m radius around the targeted position after 0.8s, dealing
599 magical damage to all enemies hit.
Hitting at least one enemy reduces the cooldown of the ability by 5s.

spell.name: Combustion
spell.description:
Torch the targeted enemy, dealing 451 magical damage over 5s. The burning enemy will flee from you for 0.75s. While burning they leave a fiery trail which lasts 4.5s.
The trail deals 82 magical damage(vs. players) / 88 magical damage(vs. mobs) every 0.5s(the damage can't be reflected). Enemies touching the trail will flee from you for 0.75s.

spell.name: Magma Sphere
spell.description:
Release a devastating magma sphere in the targeted direction, rolling through all enemies
Deals 689 magical damage.
Enemy players who are not mounted will take 12% of their Max Health as true damage over 4s (this damage can't be reflected).

spell.name: Meteor
spell.description:
Call down a meteor, impacting after 1s at the targeted position.
Deals 1369 magical damage to all enemies in a 5m radius (this damage cannot be reflected).
Knocks back all enemies hit by 4.74m.

spell.name: Flame Tornado
spell.description:
Conjures a Flame Tornado with a 5.01m radius at the targeted position lasting 5.3s.
Deals 189 magical damage (vs. players) / 137 magical damage (vs. mobs) every 0.5s.
Enemies leaving the area will continue to take 568 magical damage (vs. players) / 411 magical damage (vs. mobs) over 1s (damage can't be reflected).

spell.name: Flaming Phoenix
spell.description:
Summon a Flaming Phoenix that breathes fire over a 18m long area from the targeted position in the targeted direction.
Deals 709 magical damage to all enemies hit.
Sets the ground on fire for 6s.
Enemies within the area take 35 magical damage every 0.5s.
Also reduces Healing Cast by 40%.

spell.name: Holy Explosion
spell.description:
Release a Holy Explosion in a 7m radius around you, knocking back all enemies hit by 23.04m. Heals up to 5m for 107 every 0.5s, while channeling for 2s. Increases the damage resistances of allies hit by the first tick by 35 for 3s.
Each 0.5s channeling costs 13 Energy

spell.name: Divine Protection
spell.description:
Give the targeted ally a  shield, absorbing up to  1439 damage (before resistances) for  4s .
If the shield  isn't broken  during its duration, it will release a healing pulse, restoring  247 Health  for up to  5  allies in a  5m radius  around the target.

spell.name: Desperate Prayer
spell.description:
Cast a Desperate Prayer on the targeted ally, healing the target based on their current Health.
Current Health: above 40% | below 40%
Healing: 201 | 443
If the current Health of your target is above 40%, your Healing Cast is increased by 5% for 15s(stacks up to 3 times).

spell.name: Holy Touch
spell.description: Cover the targeted ally in divine light, healing the target for 129 Health every 0.6s, while channeling for up to 3s(can be used while stunned or silenced). Cleanses all Crowd Control effects and debuffs(except damage over time effects).

spell.name: Salvation
spell.description: Create a circle of Salvation with a 5.5m radius around the targeted position, charging up for 2s. Once it is finished charging, it will heal up to 10 allies for 578 Health. Cleanses all Crowd Control effects and debuffs(except for damage over time effects).

spell.name: Celestial Sphere
spell.description: Cast a Celestial Sphere at the targeted ally. Jumps to the closest ally within a 11m radius of the last ally hit, restoring 182 Health with each hit(can hit up to 10 targets; can hit the same target multiple times, but not twice in a row).

spell.name: Divine Intervention
spell.description:
Leap  towards the targeted position, becoming immune to damage, debuffs, and Crowd Control effects until impact. Throws all enemies within a 5m radius in the air for 0.8s. Restores 272 Health for up to 10 allies within a 5m radius.
Healing at least one ally reduces this ability cooldown by 40%.

spell.name: Time Freeze
spell.description:
Freeze time for all enemies within a 5m radius for 3s(vs. players)/4s(vs. mobs)(ignores Crowd Control Resistance). Targets frozen in time are stunned. Players frozen in time are also immune to damage and all abilities.
Targets cannot be frozen again for 5s.

spell.name: Protective Beam
spell.description:
Conjures an arcane shield in a 5m radius around the targeted ally, while channeling for 9s. Absorbs up to 631 damage(before resistances). Reapplies the shield every 1s, costing 19 Energy.
The shield lastst up to 2s after the channel has ended.

spell.name: Arcane Orb
spell.description: Shoot a sphere of arcane energy in the targeted direction, dealing 210 magical damage in a 6m radius upon impact with an enemy. Purges all buffs on enemies hit(except for healing over time effects). Silences enemies for 2.35s(vs players)/ 4.7s(vs mobs).

spell.name: Black Hole
spell.description: Create a black hole with a 6m radius at the targeted position.  After 1s, the black hole pulls all enemies within its radius towards its center. Deals 463 magical damage. Slows by 16% for 6.99s

spell.name: Time Corridor
spell.description:
Create a 25m long corridor of altered time in the targeted direction, lasting for 8s. Increases Move Speed by 60% and Attack Speed by 45% for all allies in the corridor.
Slows all enemies in the corridor by 30%.

spell.name: The Void
spell.description: Creates an area which removes all positive effects from enemies and removes all negative effects from allies, while also Increasing the resistances of allies by 85. While channeling, the area grows from 2m up to 8m radius, and collapses once the channeling ends. The channel can't be interrupted and lasts for 5s.

spell.name: Dark Sphere
spell.description:
Call down a dark sphere, impacting after 0.4s. Deals 315 magical damage to all enemies in a 5m radius. Applies a Dark Aura on up to 3 enemies hit.
Each Dark Aura has a 5m radius around the affected enemy lasting for 5s. Decreases healing received by 25% and all damage dealt by 25%(vs players)/ by 12%(vs mobs) within the aura. Slows by 15%(all effects stack up to 3 times).

spell.name: Ice Storm
spell.description: Summon an ice storm with a 5m radius, moving from the targeted position in the targeted direction for 18m and lasting for 15s. Deals 227 magical damage(vs. players) / 79 magical damage(vs. mobs) to all enemies within the storm every 0.5s(damage can't be reflected). Slows by 30%.

spell.name: Hail
spell.description:
Conjure a wave of hail with a 5m radius around the targeted position, which crashes down after 0.4s. Deals 448 magical damage.
The spell can be recast within 3s.

spell.name: Freezing Wind
spell.description: Blow Freezing Wind in a cone in front of you, dealing 499 magical damage. Enemies inside the Freezing Wind become gradually frozen over 0.8s, first slowing them, then ending in a root for 3.5s.

spell.name: Avalanche
spell.description:
Launch a giant snowball in the targeted direction, rolling over all enemies. Deals 172 magical damage(damage cannot be reflected). The snowball starts with a 2m radius, growing up to 3.1m while it rolls.
The snowball leaves behind a freezing trail, lasting 4s. Slows all enemies on it by 
40%.
Recast the ability to cause the snowball to explode, dealing 459 magical damage(damage cannot be reflected) within a 4m radius. Stuns all enemies hit for 1.86s.

spell.name: Frozen Hell
spell.description: Create a blizzard with a 8m radius at the targeted position, lasting 5s. Deals 69 magical damage to all enemies in it every 1s. Slows by 50%(ignores Crowd Control Resistance).

spell.name: Ice Crystal
spell.description: Create an Ice Crystal with a 4m radius at the targeted position, stunning all enemies hit for 1s. After the stun, the crystal explodes, dealing 582 magical damage(vs. players) / 800 magical damage(vs. mobs) to all enemies within a 4m radius(the damage cant be reflected.

spell.name: Glacial Prison
spell.description:
Create a freezing field in a 6m radius around the target, lasting 3s. Slows all enemies in it by 30% (ignores Crowd Control Resistance).
Targeting an ally will freeze the target in a crystal immediately for 2s. Targeting an enemy will freeze the target in a crystal after 1.1s for 2s, if it hasn't left the field. Frozen targets are stunned, immune to damage, and can't be healed. 
After the freeze ends, the crystal explodes, dealing 640 magical damage to all enemies within a 2m radius.

spell.name: Area of Decay
spell.description:
Create an Area of Decay with a 4m radius, applying Vile Curse charges every 0.8s, while channeling for 3.2s. Purges healing over time effects from all enemies in the area.
Each Vile Curse Charge deals 267 magical damage over 8s(stacks up to 4 times).

spell.name: Anguished Soul
spell.description:
Send an Anguished Soul in the targeted direction, passing through all enemies. Deals 505 magical damage.
Any enemy hit will be feared for a duration based on the amount of Vile Curse Charges on them. 

Charges:  0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4
Fear Duration: 1s | 1.25s | 1.5s | 1.75s | 2s

spell.name: Death Curse
spell.description:
Place a Death Curse on the targeted enemy after 0.15s, dealing  magical damage based on the amount  of Vile Curse Charges on the target after 5s (the damage cannot be reflected).
Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4
Damage: 453 | 680 | 907 | 1179 | 1541
Consumes all Vile Curse Charges on the enemy.

spell.name: Enfeeble Blades
spell.description:
Summon enfeebling blades, spinning in a 5m radius around the targeted location while channeling for 4s(can't be interrupted). The blades deal 95 magical damage every 0.5s.
Purges all buffs of all enemies within the area. Decreases all damage an enemy deals by 4% for each hit they have received (stacks up to 5 times) for 3s.

spell.name: Haunting Screams
spell.description:
Summon tortured souls for 5.3s, haunting the ground in a 6m radius around the targeted position and moving 12m in the targeted direction. Deals 88 magical damage every 0.5s to all enemies within the area (the damage can't be reflected).
Players will also take 1.2% of their Max Health as true damage every 0.5s.

spell.name: Cataclysm
spell.description: Curse all enemies within a 13m radius around the targeted position, dealing 341 magical damage over 5.5s. Decreases damage resistance by 53.

spell.name: Pounce
spell.description:
Leap towards target position, dealing 520 physical damage in a 4m radius upon impact.
Hitting an enemy player, will reduce the cooldown of this ability by 50%.

spell.name: Barbed Roots
spell.description:
Gather nature's energy, becoming immune to damage, while channeling for up to 3s (can't be interrupted; can be used while stunned or silenced). Slows all enemies within a 11m radius by 50%. Deals 173 magical damage every 0.7s.
At the start of the channel, cleanse all Crowd Control effects and debuffs (except damage over time effects) of up to 20 allies in the radius. While in the radius, allies gain a shield that absorbs up to 662 damage during the next 3s. Grants immunity to Forced Movement effects.

spell.name: Wild Onslaught
spell.description:
Combine up to 2 abilities. The combo resets after 8s.
1st Wild Onslaught: 
Dash in the target direction knocking back all enemies you pass through by 3.07m. Deals 158 physical damage. Decreases damage resistances by 53 for 5s.
2nd Roar: 
Unleash a mighty roar, dealing 410 physical damage(vs players)/631 physical damage(vs mobs) in a cone in front of you. Enemies hit will flee from you for 1.2s. Makes you the highest-priority target for all mobs hit.

spell.name: Rip Through
spell.description: Dash through targeted enemy, landing 3m behind them. Deals 505 physical damage to any enemy you pass through. Increases your attack damage by 150% for 3s.

spell.name: Hellfire Barrage
spell.description: Release a Hellfire Barrage at the targeted enemy, slowing yourself by 30%, while channeling for up to 3s. Deals 101 magical damage ever 0.2s.

spell.name: Tectonic Shift
spell.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 4s.
1st Tectonic Shift 
Shift the ground, creating a stone wall in a cone in front of you which knocks back enemies by 2m. Pulls all enemies between you and the wall towards you. Deals 189 physical damage(vs players)/441 physical damage(vs mobs) to all enemies pulled. Makes you the highest-priority target for all mobs hit.
2nd Tectonic Slam 
Slam the ground, dealing 394 physical damage in a 6m radius. Throws all enemies hit into the air for 3.07s. Creates a Rune, lasting 5s which decreases Max and current Health of all enemies within by 15%.

spell.name: Judgment
spell.description: Launch a beam of immense energy at the targeted enemy, dealing 1104 magical damage in a 7m radius after 1.5s (this damage cannot be reflected).

spell.name: Relentless Assault
spell.description:
Dash in the targeted direction, dealing 381 physical damage (vs players) / 344 physical damage (vs mobs) to all enemies you pass through.
Conjure an area with a 15m radius around you after dashing, lasting 12s.
While inside the area, hitting at least one enemy will reduce the cooldown of your weapon abilities by 33%.
The ability can be recast every 3s while the ability is active

spell.name: Limitbreaker
spell.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets 6s after the first ability has ended.
1st Reach Limits:
Concentrate your power, increasing your Move Speed by 30% while channeling for up to 2s.
Increases all damage you deal by 35% for 6s.
Ending the channel enables the next combo ability.

2nd Limitbreaker:
Swipe your sword twice in a cone in front of you, dealing 370 physical damage with each swipe.

spell.name: Eye of the Storm
spell.description:
Combine up to three abilities. The combo resets after 4s.
1st & 2nd Dreadstorm Sweep:
Swing your weapon in a cone in front of you, dealing 144 physical damage to all enemies hit.
If you hit at least one enemy, gain one Eye of the Storm charge.

3rd Dreadstorm Surge:
Smash the ground in front of you, dealing 313 physical damage in a 4m radius.
Casting this ability grants you one Eye of the Storm charge.

Eye of the Storm:
Become the center of a storm that grows in size based on your Eye of the Storm charges, lasting 5s.
Reduces damage resistances of all enemies in the storm by 52 and slows them by 25%.

Eye of the Storm Charges: 1 | 2 | 3
Eye of the Storm Radius: 6m | 7.5m | 9m

spell.name: Hyperstatic
spell.description:
Smash the ground in front of you, opening a vein of charged magical energy.
Allies in the area gain a Shield, absorbing up to 1104 damage (before resistances) for up to 4s.

Deals 284 magical damage to enemies.
Applies one Static stack for 6s.
Enemies gain one additional Static stack whenever they receive direct damage.
Stuns enemies with 5 Static stacks for 4.92s.

spell.name: Unstoppable Rush
spell.description:
Dash to a targeted enemy, releasing a Pulse of raw energy, dealing 156 magical damage.
Decreases Max and Current Health by 3% for 5s (stacks up to 5 times).
Gain 3 Pulse Charges for the next 3s.
Pulse Charges release an additional Pulse with each Weapon ability or Auto-Attack.

The ability can be recast within 5s, increasing its cooldown to 30s (elapsed time before recasting is refunded).

spell.name: Flickershots
spell.description:
Dash to the targeted position, unleashing a barrage of energy bolts in a 8m radius around you.
Deals 318 physical damage.
Gain 103 damage resistances while dashing.
The ability can be recast within 5s up to 3 times, increasing its cooldown by 10s per cast.

spell.name: Sky's Fury
spell.description:
Leap to the targeted position and conjure a foothold in the air, becoming Untargetable for up to 3.75s.
Increases your Defense vs. mobs by 90% for 3.75s.
Sky Bolt:
Shoot a lightning-infused arrow at the targeted position, dealing 441 magical damage in a 4m radius to all enemies after 0.4s.

The ability can be recast up to 3 times while Sky's Fury is active, firing a Sky Bolt.
After 3 Sky Bolt casts, Sky's Fury ends.

spell.name: Ring of Death
spell.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s (elapsed time before recasting is refunded).
1st Ring of Death:
Throw six daggers in a 7m radius around you, piercing through all enemies and dealing 178 physical damage.
The daggers form a ring that deals 102 physical damage every 0.5s, lasting 6s.
Increases your Move Speed by 40% for up to 2s.

2nd Recall Daggers:
Recall all daggers to your current position.
Each dagger can pierce a maximum of 4 targets.
Deal physical damage depending on the total amount of daggers that hit a target.

Amount of Daggers: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6
Damage: 208 | 416 | 624 | 832 | 1041 | 1249

spell.name: Razor's Edge
spell.description:
Unleash a vast amount of force in a line in front of you, knocking back all enemies hit within 8m by 7.07m.
Deals physical damage to all enemies hit within 17m based on the amount of Spirit Spear Charges on you.

Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 508 | 653 | 798 | 943
Consumes all your Spirit Spear Charges.

spell.name: Phantom Twin
spell.description:
Combine up to 3 abilities. The combo resets after 5s.
1st & 2nd: Phantom Twin
Summon a projection for 2s, slashing around itself in a 5m radius at the targeted position and moving 6m away from you.
Deals 136 physical damage every 0.5s within the radius (damage cannot be reflected).
Slows by 15%.

3rd: Phantom Slash
Slam the ground in a 5m radius around the targeted position in sync with a projection, throwing all enemies hit in the air for 0.7s.
Deals 434 physical damage.

spell.name: Serpent's Gaze
spell.description:
Transform into a Crystal Cobra for up to 15s.
This changes your abilities and stats.
Offensive: medium
Defensive: medium
Energy Regeneration: very high
Slippery
The next time you are Stunned or Rooted, Cleanse yourself, and gain 40% Move Speed and Immunity to Stuns and Roots for 2s.

spell.name: Dual Nature
spell.description:
Gather ambient magic, affecting up to 10 targets in a 7m radius around you for 8s.
While the ability is active, recasting invokes the opposing ability.
Fortify:
Grants a 491 damage shield for 1.5s.
Restores 64 Health to allies every 0.85s.
Increases your Healing Cast by 15%.

Ensnare:
Roots enemies for 3.15s (enemies cannot be Rooted by you again).
Increases allies' Damage by 15%.

spell.name: Spontaneous Combustion
spell.description:
Transform into a Fireball, becoming immune to All Effects as you Fly up to 14m towards the targeted position.
Deal 542 to all enemies in a 5m radius on impact.
Deal 181 over 2s to all enemies you pass through.
Hitting an enemy player with the impact will reduce this ability's cooldown by 40%.

spell.name: Sanctify
spell.description:
Sanctify an area at the targeted position, restoring 296 health for up to 20 allies in a 5m radius.
Increases the max and current health of all healed allies by 20% for 3s.
Removes enemy-placed ground-based areas (does not affect areas that buff or heal).

spell.name: Starfall
spell.description:
Call down a shooting star shower, dealing 199 magical damage in a 8m radius around you every 0.6s, while channelling for up to 6s (can't be interrupted).
Increases your Resilience Penetration by 20%.
Each 1s channeled costs 13 Energy.

spell.name: Arctic Volley
spell.description:
Fire a volley of icicles in the targeted direction every 0.4s, while channeling for 2.2s (can move while channeling).
Each volley deals 284 magical damage in a 4m radius on impact.
Slows by 10% for 1s (stacks up to 6 times).
Costs 9 energy for every volley fired.

spell.name: Plaguebringer
spell.description:
Conjure a Plaguebringer, knocking back all enemies by 6m (ignoring Crowd Control Resistance), and spreading cursed miasma in the targeted direction.
Deals 491.
Negates the target's Healing Received for 2s.
Targets cannot have their Healing Received Negated by Plaguebringer for 6s.
